title: password e-mail salvate su thunderbird
creator: rskowalsky
content: Buongiorno, dopo un crash in un pc ho salvato tutti i dati dell'hard disk compresa tutta la configurazione di thunderbird. Su un nuovo pc ho caricato il profilo(non avevo account mozilla) ed è andato a buon fine, caricando tutte le mail con tutti gli account eccetto le password. Alcuni provider non permettono il cambio di password se non sei più cliente loro(es. tim in italia) e quindi non ricordando la password non è più utilizzabile nonostante abbia recuperato tutti i file di profilo. Come posso recuperare le password salvate dai file di una precedente versione di thunderbird? Grazie Roberto

title: how to get my yahoo mail account working again, after all of a sudden after April 4 2026 just stopped receiving emails.
creator: bb_nycuws
content:
As of April 4 midnight my yahoo account in Thunderbird just stopped receiving incoming pop messages nor can I send. According to Yahoo, it showed that Thunderbird had access. Thunderbird showed how many new messages to download, but then does nothing but hang and time out. I have removed all stored yahoo passwords; I have removed yahoo permissions in yahoo in order to start over. I get the normal log in screens to add permission with oauth2, signed into yahoo account in yahoo and it shows thunderbird has access, yet Thunderbird still can NOT access yahoo mail (download pop or send smpt). YES MY SETTINGS are correct. They haven;t change since before April 4 midnight. I need this account active again. HELP!!! email to X@hotmail.com with Yahoo in the subject line: According to THunderbird, I have version 140.9 esr. when I press check for updates it says I'm up to date. Although the yahoo help page says as of March 2026 version 148. confused. Bill

(PII redacted by moderator)

title: mails are shown twice
creator: mail767
content: I installed Thunderbird on a new computer running Windows 11. I use Thunderbird for 14 email accounts. I have set the folder view to "Unified Folders." In the Inbox, emails from different accounts appear twice—sometimes they do, sometimes they don't. These emails are not duplicates; in the folders for each individual account, the emails are all displayed only once. I don't have this problem on my old computer—same Windows, same Thunderbird, looks exactly the same. Does anyone have any idea what might be causing this?

title: Thunderbird 140.9.1esr (64-bit) keeps changing default email account from a MS365 account to my Gmail account on startup
creator: lyle.beaman
content:
Hello!

I am using Thunderbird 140.9.1esr (64-bit) on a Ubuntu 24.04 system. Every time I restart Thunderbird, it reverts to a little used Gmail account as the default account. I have several accounts, but my main email account is a MS365 account. I reset the setting, but every time it is restarted, the default goes back to Gmail. I have tried everything that I've found online, but cannot correct this behaviour.

Do you have any suggestions or assistance?

Many thanks!
